title: 20 Pcs Plastic Reusable Washable Assorted Fruit Shaped ICE Cubes
features: ✅【High Quality Materials】eMKay quick frozen fruit shaped ice cube moulds are made of high quality plastics that are environmentally friendly and durable. It can be added to a drink in a short amount of time to make a smoothie that has a good ice effect.

✅【Creative Design】eMKay quick frozen ice cube moulds have fruit shaped styles, bright colours and very creative designs. Pouring ice cubes into the drink does not affect its appearance. It will be loved by you and your children
✅【Easy to Use】Clean the surface of the chilled small ice cubes and put them in the refrigerator. Put the frozen ice cubes in the cup, pour the drink and gently shake it. The drink will cool quickly.

✅【Easy to Clean】You can fill in an appropriate amount of ice cubes depending on how cool the drink is. After you've used the quick frozen ice cube mould, simply rinse it off with clean water and put it in the refrigerator for next use.

✅【Widely Used】Colourful fruit shaped ice cubes provide excellent results for cooling drinks. Suitable for family afternoon tea, garden party, etc. Enjoy delicious drinks with your family and friends and enjoy a happy time
description: Product Description Directions for use! Drop the cubes into your drinks and savour the flavor. Make sure to rinse thoroughly after use. Wipe dry with a towel. Place them in the freezer. Key Features Reusable and easy to use. Simply freeze the reusable ice cubes for a few hours before use—no hassle like traditional ice cubes. Made from food-grade plastic material. These reusable ice cubes are made from 100% food-grade plastic, tested and approved through strict quality control. The thick, durable plastic prevents leaks, but even if one occurs, there's no need to worry—the cubes are filled with distilled water, making them safe for use in your drinks. Perfect for a variety of beverages and occasions. Whether it's a family gathering, company dinner, or everyday use, these plastic ice cubes are the perfect choice.
